𝟲 𝗺𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗵𝘀 𝗮𝗴𝗼 I was packing inventory in my 𝗴𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗲. But what kept me going was meeting real residents and seeing how excited they were to have access to well-stocked, modern machines in their building. That excitement turned into demand, and 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗵𝗮𝘀𝗻'𝘁 𝘀𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗱 𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻. 𝗟𝗮𝘀𝘁 𝗺𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗵, we added our first company vehicle to keep up with our growing client base. 𝗔 𝗳𝗲𝘄 𝘄𝗲𝗲𝗸𝘀 𝗮𝗴𝗼, we posted a job looking for part-time help, but things are moving so fast that a week later we brought on our first 𝗳𝘂𝗹𝗹-𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲 𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗲𝗲. 𝗡𝗼𝘄 we’re walking into our 𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗵𝗼𝘂𝘀𝗲 every morning to service our 𝟯𝟬+ 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 across Denver. With this new space, every property we work with gets 𝗱𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆, 𝗳𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗰𝗸𝘀, 𝗴𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁 𝘃𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘁𝘆, and a 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺 that shows up — not just a guy with a garage. It still doesn't feel real, but here's a look inside 🎬👇 #denver #propertymanagement #AAMDHQ

Transcript Transcript
Transcript
All right, come here. This is exciting. I'm finally moving into my warehouse. I'm one of the very first tenants here at Where Space down in Centennial, O. Come on in here and check it out. This used to be an empty room. We've put in all of our shelving, and right now in this space right here, we're about 30% capacity. It allows us to store more variety, more fresh goods. Now here you can see our mountain of Gatorade. We're probably going to go through this in about 1 1/2 weeks. The strategy has discipled through everything that we're going to have in here. Every two weeks, so all the products are going to stay fresh, but it allows us to be creative with some brand new requests. I know people have been asking for things like Coke 0. We're finally doing it. We can also take on more unique requests, test some items out and see what's really going to work at each property. They each tend to have a different and unique kind of product selection that they want to have in the planogram over here. Really excited about this. We're going to have a freezer so we can do ice cream meals, frozen snacks. That's been one of the most popular requests and we're finally going to be able to deliver on this. Over here, we're going to have a refrigerator so we can do sandwiches, wraps, fresh meals. That's really popular more in the commercial space than residential. Alright, thanks for checking out the warehouse. We're going to check back in with you as soon as we have our freezers or refrigerators and a bunch of fun, exciting, unique products to tell you about.
Tammy Watkins 3w
